case_title: AMANDA ANSELMINO VS. BRIT MEDIA, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-21-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRIT MEDIA, INC.
CORRESPONDENCE LETTER FROM CT CORP STATING CT CORP IS UNABLE TO FORWARD SERVICE OF PROCESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANSELMINO, AMANDA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF AMANDA ANSELMINO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRIT MEDIA INC., IS PRESENT. THE COURT REVIEWS LETTER RECEIVED BY NATIONAL REGISTERED AGENTS AND AMANDA ANSELMINO REPRESENTATIVE STATING THAT NATIONAL REGISTERED AGENTS ARE NO LONGER THE AGENT OF SERVICE FOR BRIT MEDIA, INC. THE COURT REVIEWS THE INFORMATION LISTED ON THE SECRETARY OF STATE'S WEBSITE WHICH STATES THAT NATIONAL REGISTERED AGENTS IS THE AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT DEEMS THAT THE PROOF OF SERVICE IS VALID AND HEARING IS HELD. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANSELMINO, AMANDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRIT MEDIA, INC. $8,135.92 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,225.92 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,135.92 FILED BY ANSELMINO, AMANDA AS TO DEFENDANT BRIT MEDIA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANSELMINO, AMANDA AS TO DEFENDANT BRIT MEDIA, INC.
